summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Inventory Dashboard features (P1). All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: /inventory page loads with 7 overview cards, stock table with search/filter, low stock filter button, movements tab, projects tab, and sidebar navigation.

issues: Minor: Sidebar shows 'Инвентар' but page title shows 'Наличности' - both are valid Bulgarian translations but could be unified for consistency

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/inventory/dashboard returns complete data with overview, stock, top_moved, project_remainders
Overview includes all 7 required fields: total_materials, total_value, low_stock_count, on_projects_count, recent_intakes, recent_issues, recent_returns
Stock items correctly include is_low_stock flag based on threshold comparison (qty <= threshold)
PUT /api/inventory/threshold correctly updates threshold and persists to database
Top moved materials correctly sorted by move count (descending)
Project remainders correctly filtered to only show items with remaining > 0
Frontend: 7 overview cards display correctly with proper styling and colors
Frontend: Stock table shows material, unit, quantity, value, threshold, status columns
Frontend: Low stock items correctly highlighted with red 'Ниско' badge and red text for quantity
Frontend: 'Ниски (1)' filter button toggles showLowOnly state correctly
Frontend: Search filter works correctly on stock table
Frontend: Movements tab shows top moved materials with intake/issue/return counts
Frontend: Projects tab shows remainders by project with navigation to project detail
Frontend: Sidebar 'Инвентар' navigation link works correctly, navigates to /inventory
seed_data_creation: Used existing test materials and transactions. Stock: TEST_Posting_Material_1 (19.45бр), TEST_Posting_Material_2 (15м), Гипсова мазилка Knauf (13кг), Грунд универсален (2л LOW). Project remainders: PRJ-001 has 3 items with remaining > 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Dashboard module fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/inventory/dashboard (returns overview, stock, top_moved, project_remainders), PUT /api/inventory/threshold (updates low stock threshold). Frontend: /inventory page with 3 tabs (stock, movements, projects), search filter, low stock filter button. Default threshold is 5. Stock with qty <= threshold gets is_low_stock=true. data-testid values: inventory-dashboard, stock-search, low-stock-filter, stock-table, tab-stock, tab-movements, tab-projects, movements-table, projects-table. All 12 backend tests pass. All frontend interactions verified working.

Overview contains all 7 required fields.notes: total_materials, total_value, low_stock_count, on_projects_count, recent_intakes, recent_issues, recent_returns

PUT /api/inventory/threshold updates thr.notes: Threshold persisted and reflected in subsequent dashboard calls

Frontend: 7 overview cards display.notes: All 7 cards visible with correct data

Frontend: Stock table columns.notes: Материал, Мярка, Налично, Стойност, Праг, Статус

Frontend: Projects tab.notes: Shows project remainders with clickable navigation

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
